html:
Exclusive to:

Mussel Bouillabaise is a Warly specific Food item exclusive to the Shipwrecked DLC. It is cooked in the Portable Crock Pot by adding 2 Raw Mussels and 2.0 units of Vegetables and takes 40 seconds to cook.

Prerequisites

  • Requires:
  • Requires:

Recipe

×2

×2

Examples

×2

×2

×2

×2

×2

×2

Trivia

  • Bouillabaisse is a traditional Provençal fish stew originating in the city of Marseille, the second largest city in France. It usually consists of bony fish, shellfish or other sea life, and vegetables.
  • The Mussel Bouillabaisse seems to be the food featured in Warly's short, and the attached vignette.

Bouillabaisse is a traditional Provençal fish stew originating in the city of Marseille, the second largest city in France. It usually consists of bony fish, shellfish or other sea life, and vegetables.
The Mussel Bouillabaisse seems to be the food featured in Warly's short, and the attached vignette.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Súp Mussel là một Thực phẩm đặc trưng của Warly dành riêng cho DLC Shipwrecked. Nó được nấu trong Nồi Hầm Di Động bằng cách thêm 2 Trai Sống và 2 đơn vị Rau và mất 40 giây để nấu.

'''Mussel Bouillabaise''' is a [[Warly]] specific [[Food]] [[item]] exclusive to the ''[[Don't Starve: Shipwrecked|Shipwrecked]]'' DLC. It is cooked in the [[Portable Crock Pot]] by adding 2 [[Mussel|Raw Mussel]]s and 2.0 units of [[Vegetables]] and takes 40 seconds to cook.

== Prerequisites ==
* Requires: [[File:Mussel.png|link=Mussel]]
* Requires: [[File:Vegetables Crock Pot.png|link=Vegetables]]

== [[File:Cookbook.png|32px|link=]] Recipe ==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Mussel
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Vegetables
|count2 = 2
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Mussel Bouillabaise
}}

==Examples==
{{Recipe
|item1 = Mussel
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Seaweed
|count2 = 2
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Mussel Bouillabaise}}

{{Recipe

|count1 = 2
|item2 = Carrot
|item3 = Sweet Potato
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Mussel Bouillabaise}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Mussel
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Corn
|count2 = 2
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Mussel Bouillabaise}}

{{Recipe
|item1 = Mussel
|count1 = 2
|item2 = Lichen
|item3 = Cactus Flesh
|tool = Portable Crock Pot
|result = Mussel Bouillabaise}}

== {{Pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia==
* [[Wikipedia:Bouillabaisse|Bouillabaisse]] is a traditional Provençal fish stew originating in the city of Marseille, the second largest city in France. It usually consists of bony fish, shellfish or other sea life, and vegetables.
*The Mussel Bouillabaisse seems to be the food featured in Warly's short, and the attached vignette.
